text.title: feature-prioritization-rice Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for feature-prioritization-rice as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: LLM-generated Reach values as round numbers (5000, 10000) with no analytics citation.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Round numbers signal fabrication. Force decimal Reach from actual funnel analytics. Any Reach without a source URL or table reference must be rejected and re-estimated.

failure-mode.description: Same agent both proposing and scoring features.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The proposer has obvious bias toward high-scoring its own proposals. Route scoring to a different subagent than the proposer.

failure-mode.description: Silently dropping items below a RICE threshold without emitting the full ranked list.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Hidden rejections prevent review. Always emit the full ranked list with a cut line; never suppress low-scoring items from the output.

failure-mode.description: High-RICE items with no sequencing check for dependencies.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A high-RICE item that depends on three low-RICE items cannot be started first. Dependency graph review is a required post-ranking step.
